title: The Doom of Valyria: The Survivors — House Targaryen #got #shorts
description: When Valyria burned, one house survived. Not by strength—but by foresight. This is the story of House Targaryen, the last dragonlords, and the prophecy that saved them from extinction. #Valyria #Targaryen #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: When Valyria burned, every dragonlord perished—except one house that left before the world collapsed.
scenes.image_prompt: Valyria erupting in the distance while a small group with dragons escapes across the sea, dark red sky, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: House Targaryen was not the strongest, richest, or most powerful among Valyria’s ruling families.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryen family standing apart from more powerful dragonlords in Valyria, subtle isolation, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They survived because of a dream—a vision that others dismissed as madness or fear.
scenes.image_prompt: young Daenys the Dreamer surrounded by prophetic fire visions, dragons and destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Daenys Targaryen saw the Doom before it came, a future written in fire, ash, and silence.
scenes.image_prompt: prophetic vision of Valyria exploding reflected in Daenys’s eyes, intense mystical glow, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Her father believed her, abandoning the greatest empire in the world for a distant, uncertain island.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryens leaving Valyria with dragons, sailing toward Dragonstone, somber tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Other dragonlords laughed, choosing power over caution, convinced nothing could ever destroy Valyria.
scenes.image_prompt: arrogant Valyrian nobles mocking the departing Targaryens, dragons behind them, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then the Doom came—and every house that stayed was erased from history in a single day.
scenes.image_prompt: Valyria exploding violently, dragonlords consumed by fire, apocalyptic scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: From Dragonstone, the Targaryens watched the sky burn, realizing survival came with a heavy cost.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryens standing on Dragonstone cliffs watching distant red sky of Doom, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They were no longer one house among many—they were the last keepers of fire in a world without Valyria.
scenes.image_prompt: lone Targaryen dragon flying over a dark empty world, symbolic isolation, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: And one day, that fire would rise again—not to rebuild Valyria, but to conquer a new world.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon Targaryen silhouette with dragon over Westeros map, dawn breaking, cinematic close, vertical 1080x1920
